headline: Stock Market Today: Oil Jumps 5%, S&P 500 Drops As Iran Strikes UAE Port
summary: U.S. stocks sank Monday as an Iranian drone attack on a UAE petroleum site sent Brent above $114, gold tumbled 2%, and FedEx, UPS and GXO cratered after Amazon expanded its logistics business

headline: Royal Caribbean Cruises: Buy The Fuel Fears - Risks Mostly Baked In
